descriptionShort: Trevor Dickie delivers the first part of his BC Hockey Hall of Fame induction speech on July 13, 2025.
descriptionLong: Part one of Trevor Dickie's speech during his induction into the BC Hockey Hall of Fame at the 2025 Richmond Sockeyes banner-night / reunion ceremony. Dickie, a key member of the 1987 Centennial Cup-winning team, reflects on his junior-A hockey career and the significance of the team's historic championship season.
